# Nick Brand Photography

> Nick Brand Photography is a Sydney-based commercial and portrait photography
> studio specialising in corporate headshots, personal branding, executive
> portraits, team headshots, LinkedIn headshots, actor headshots and corporate
> event photography. The studio is at 84 Centennial Avenue, Lane Cove NSW 2066,
> and Nick works on-site at offices across Greater Sydney. Photographer Nick
> Brand has 20+ years of experience and a 5.0 Google rating.

## Key facts

- Business: Nick Brand Photography
- Photographer: Nick Brand (20+ years' experience, self-taught)
- Studio address: 84 Centennial Avenue, Lane Cove NSW 2066, Australia
- Service area: Greater Sydney — on-site at offices, plus the Lane Cove studio
- Phone: 0403 835 467
- Email: info@nickbrandphotography.com
- Hours: 7am–7pm, 7 days
- Booking: https://www.nickbrandphotography.com/book

## Services and pricing (AUD)

- Corporate headshots: from $395 per person; team rate $285 per person (5+).
- LinkedIn headshots: from $395, includes a LinkedIn-optimised crop.
- Executive portraits: Professional session $695; group rates on enquiry.
- Team & office headshots: $285 per person for teams of 5+, on-site mobile studio.
- Personal branding: from $895 (half day) to $2,800 (premium full day).
- Actor headshots & model portfolios: Portfolio Build $750 (2-hour session).
- Corporate event photography: quoted per event.
- Family photography: $550 for a 90-minute outdoor Sydney session.
